result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 23:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
         fo.agent_id AS first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
), non_transferred_closed_cases AS (
  SELECT ec.*
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM assignments a
    WHERE a.case_id = ec.case_id AND a.assignment_count > 1
  )
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_closed_cases
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT final_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT agent_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handle_times
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1 AND a.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
         fo.agent_id AS first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
), non_transferred_closed_cases AS (
  SELECT ec.*
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM assignments a
    WHERE a.case_id = ec.case_id AND a.assignment_count > 1
  )
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_closed_cases
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT final_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT agent_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handle_times
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1 AND a.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
         fo.agent_id AS first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
), non_transferred_closed_cases AS (
  SELECT ec.*
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM assignments a
    WHERE a.case_id = ec.case_id AND a.assignment_count > 1
  )
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_closed_cases
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT final_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT agent_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handle_times
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1 AND a.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assigned_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate::timestamp) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
         fo.agent_id AS first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00'
), non_transferred_closed_cases AS (
  SELECT ec.*
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM assignments a
    WHERE a.case_id = ec.case_id AND a.assignment_count > 1
  )
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_closed_cases
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(first_owner_id, final_owner_id) AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT final_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id
    FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT agent_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM handle_times
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN managed_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1 AND a.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
